headline: Tiny's Metalab Ventures Celebrates Early Investment in xAI, Now Part of Newly Public SpaceX (SPCX)
summary: Victoria, British Columbia--(Newsfile Corp. - June 17, 2026) - Tiny Ltd. (TSX: TINY) ("Tiny" or the "Company"), a holding company that acquires wonderful businesses for the long term, today noted that the first venture fund managed by Metalab Ventures — the venture arm of its design and product studio subsidiary, Metalab — made an early investment in xAI in 2024 alongside providing design and engineering services. xAI has since merged into SpaceX, which completed its initial public offering on..
